description: A basic parameterized chair with adjustable leg height and backrest angle.

node_settings.action: Scale to 0.05, 0.4, 0.05. Transform X and Z to position at the corner of the seat.
Mirror the leg across X, then append another mirror across Z to get 4 legs.
Select the rear primitive of the seat box, extrude upwards.

expected_outcome: A blocky chair asset that automatically updates all four legs if the base seat dimensions are altered.

description: A staggered brick pattern with mortar gaps that can curve along a path.

node_settings.action: Set rows/cols to define the number of bricks. Size defines the wall length/height.
Check 'Compute Dual' to turn the square grid into a staggered/hex pattern (brick layout).
Extrude 'Individual Elements', use 'Inset' to create the mortar gaps.
Bevel the extruded edges to catch highlights.
Deform the generated flat wall along a user-drawn curve.

expected_outcome: A highly realistic, continuous brick wall asset that dynamically offsets seams.

description: A procedural pipe network that generates smooth joints automatically.

node_settings.action: Draw a jagged, multi-directional path in 3D space.
Resample to ensure enough points for corners.
Convert the lines into physical tubes. Intersections will be messy.
Convert the messy tubes into a single contiguous volume.
Apply smoothing to automatically fillet/weld the pipe intersections.
Convert back to polygons for rendering.

expected_outcome: A watertight manifold pipe system with organic, cast-metal style joints at every corner.

description: An organic trunk with tapering thickness and bark displacement.

node_settings.action: Draw straight up Y axis (length = tree height).
Enable 'Curve U' to get a 0-1 gradient from bottom to top.
Type `@pscale = chramp('taper', @curveu);` and adjust the ramp curve to be thick at the bottom and thin at the top.
Set surface type to 'Round Tube'. It will automatically read @pscale to taper the geometry.
Add high-frequency noise along the normals to simulate rough bark.

expected_outcome: A realistic, tapered cylinder with organic surface bumps, ready to have branches scattered onto it.

description: A mechanical gear with mathematically perfect teeth.

node_settings.action: Set Type to 'Polygon'. Columns = number of teeth * 2. Rows = 2. Uncheck End Caps.
Group every alternate primitive face on the outer ring (e.g., select 1 of 2).
Extrude the grouped faces outward to form the gear teeth. Use 'Inset' to taper them.
Bevel all hard edges to ensure it catches light correctly.

expected_outcome: A customizable mechanical gear. Altering the Tube columns immediately updates the teeth count perfectly.

description: Procedural table with adjustable dimensions and 4 automatically placed legs.

node_settings.action: Define width, depth, and thickness (e.g. 1.0, 0.05, 1.0).
Define leg height and thickness. Transform Y up by half height.
Create a box the size of the tabletop minus inset margin. Set to 'Points' mode.
Copy leg box to the 4 corner points of the points box.
Merge tabletop and copied legs.

expected_outcome: A table where modifying the tabletop dimensions automatically spaces the legs correctly.

description: Parametric bookshelf with adjustable number of shelves.

node_settings.action: Draw a vertical line for the height of the unit.
Set segment length to control shelf spacing, outputting points.
Create a wide flat box for the shelf plank.
Copy shelves onto the resampled vertical line points.
Create a tall vertical box for the side panels, mirror it, and merge.

expected_outcome: A bookshelf that automatically generates more shelves as it gets taller.

description: Standing floor lamp with a base, pole, and lampshade.

node_settings.action: Flat, wide cylinder for the weighted base.
Vertical line for the lamp pole.
Sweep a small circle along the line to make it a tube.
Open tube, tapered by making the top radius smaller than the bottom radius.
Move the shade to the top of the pole and merge everything.

description: Door frame and swinging door panel.

node_settings.action: Vertical grid for the wall section.
Box representing the door opening.
Subtract cutter from wall. Extract the inside faces to create the frame.
Box sized to fit the hole. Move its pivot to the left edge.
Rotate the door on Y axis to swing it open.

expected_outcome: A hinged door set inside a precise hole in a wall.

description: Window frame with inner muntins and glass panes.

node_settings.action: Set rows/cols to define the number of window panes (e.g. 2x3).
Extrude all primitives with an inset to create frames. Output side faces only.
Extrude the resulting frame backward for thickness.
Fill the remaining holes and assign a 'glass' material group.

expected_outcome: A divided window frame with distinct glass geometry.

description: Linear staircase with adjustable step count and rise/run.

node_settings.action: Create a single step (tread and riser combined).
Use a Copy and Transform node.
In the Copy node, translate Y (rise) and Z (run) by specific amounts.
Adjust the 'Number of Copies' to make the stairs taller.

expected_outcome: A perfectly spaced set of stairs.

description: Picket fence segment that can repeat.

node_settings.action: Horizontal line defining the segment length. Resample to define picket spacing.
Tall thin box. Polybevel the top points to make it pointed.
Copy pickets along the line points.
Create two horizontal boxes to hold the pickets together.

description: Handrail with vertical balusters.

node_settings.action: Draw a path. Sweep a profile along it for the top handrail.
Resample the curve to get baluster points.
Vertical tube for the baluster.
Copy balusters to the resampled points.

expected_outcome: A continuous rail over evenly spaced vertical supports.

description: Glass bottle defined by a profile curve.

node_settings.action: Draw half the silhouette of a vase on the XY plane.
Revolve the curve 360 degrees around the Y axis.
Add a tiny amount of thickness so it renders as glass properly.

expected_outcome: A perfectly symmetrical, smooth vase or bottle.

description: Wheel with outer rim and inner radial spokes.

node_settings.action: Large thin tube for the outer tire/rim.
Long thin cylinder stretching from center to rim.
Copy and rotate the spoke 360/N degrees N times.
Small thick tube at the center to hold the spokes.

description: Classical architectural column with base and capital.

node_settings.action: Tall tube. Add fluting by selecting alternating vertical edge loops and moving them inward.
Stack a few beveled boxes for the base.
Stack and taper boxes for the top capital.
Combine base, shaft, and capital.

description: A modular, tilable section of a brick or stone wall.

node_settings.action: Flat square grid.
Scatter points for stone centers.
Fracture the grid into stone shapes.
Extrude individual pieces outward, with a slight inset for grout lines.
Bevel the hard edges to make them look like worn stone.

expected_outcome: An organic, irregular stone wall surface.

description: Asphalt road with painted lines.

node_settings.action: Draw the path of the road.
Horizontal line for the width of the road.
Sweep the line along the curve. Generate UVs along the length.
Ensure UVs are laid out from 0 to 1 so a painted line texture repeats perfectly.

expected_outcome: A curved ribbon of geometry with proper UVs for a road texture.

description: Building front generated from a 2D grid.

node_settings.action: Vertical grid. Rows are floors, columns are rooms.
Inset all faces, outputting the borders as walls.
Extrude the borders outward to give the building depth.
Push the original inset faces backward to form the glass windows.

description: Coiled spring using twist deformation.

node_settings.action: Draw a vertical line. Offset it slightly on the X axis from the origin.
Add lots of points so it can deform smoothly.
Apply a huge twist amount (e.g. 3600 degrees) along the Y axis. The line will spiral around the origin.
Sweep a tiny circle along the resulting spiral to give it thickness.

description: Procedural suspension bridge with adjustable length, pillars, and cables.

node_settings.action: Horizontal line for the bridge length. Sweep a flat box profile for the deck.
Resample the line to define pillar spacing.
Tall box copied to the pillar points.
Draw a drooping parabolic curve between pillars.
Vertical lines connecting the main cable to the deck.

expected_outcome: A complete suspension bridge that scales proportionally.

description: Interlocking metal chain links following a path.

node_settings.action: Create a single chain link. Scale Z to make it oval.
Duplicate the link and rotate it 90 degrees, translating it forward to interlock.
Copy this pair of links multiple times along the Z axis.
Draw the path the chain should follow.
Deform the straight chain along the drawn curve.

description: Twisted multi-strand rope.

node_settings.action: Draw a straight line for the core.
Create a small circle profile.
Copy the circle 3 times, rotated 120 degrees around the center.
Sweep the 3 circles along the line to create 3 parallel strands.
Apply a high twist value along the length of the strands to braid them together.

description: A closed book with a hard cover and pages.

node_settings.action: Create a box for the paper block. Color it white.
Create a slightly larger box for the cover. Color it brown.
Bevel the spine edge of the cover for a rounded back.
Subtract a tiny sliver to create the gap between the cover and the pages.

description: Wooden barrel with metal bands.

node_settings.action: Create a barrel shape by tapering the top and bottom of a tube.
Select vertical faces and extrude them individually slightly to create wooden planks.
Create circles at specific heights for the metal bands.
Sweep a flat profile along the circles to create the metal rings.

description: A classic fantasy potion bottle with a cork.

node_settings.action: Draw the half-profile of a bulbous bottle and thin neck.
Revolve 360 degrees to create the glass shell.
Add thickness to the glass.
Create a slightly tapered tube and place it in the neck opening.

description: A coffee mug with a handle.

node_settings.action: Create a cylinder for the main cup body.
Extrude the top face inward, then down to hollow out the cup.
Draw a 'C' shaped curve on the side for the handle.
Sweep a circle along the curve to give the handle thickness.
Union the handle to the cup body.

description: A basic medieval sword.

node_settings.action: Long, flat box. Scale the top points together to form a tip.
Horizontal box placed below the blade.
Vertical cylinder below the crossguard.
Place at the bottom of the grip.

description: A round wooden shield with a metal rim.

node_settings.action: Flat, wide tube. Add a slight dome shape by moving the center points up.
A slightly larger tube with a hole in the middle to act as the metal binding.
A flattened half-sphere placed in the exact center of the shield.

description: A wooden longbow with a string.

node_settings.action: Draw the bent shape of the bow limbs.
Sweep a circular profile along the curve, tapering the ends.
Draw a straight line connecting the two extreme ends of the bow curve.

description: An arrow with a shaft, arrowhead, and fletching.

node_settings.action: Long, very thin cylinder.
Place at the front of the shaft.
Cut a grid into a feather shape.
Copy the fletching 3 times radially around the back of the shaft.

description: A royal gold crown.

node_settings.action: Create a flat grid, subdivide it, and delete top alternating faces to make spikes.
Add thickness to the flat spike pattern.
Bend the flat strip 360 degrees into a perfect circle.
Fuse the seam where the ends meet.

description: Vines growing and wrapping around an object.

node_settings.action: Scatter start and end points on a target mesh.
Generate wandering curves connecting the points across the mesh surface.
Give the curves a small thickness for the main vine stems.
Scatter new points on the stems and copy leaf geometry (a bent grid) onto them.

expected_outcome: Organic ivy wrapping around any input shape.

description: Fluffy, volumetric clouds generated from spheres.

node_settings.action: Scatter points inside a bounding box.
Copy overlapping spheres of varying sizes onto the points.
Convert the spheres into a single SDF volume.
Use volume noise to distort the SDF, making the edges fluffy and organic.
Convert from SDF to a Density/Fog VDB for rendering.

description: A moon-like impact crater on a terrain.

node_settings.action: Create a base flat terrain.
Use a radial ramp pattern. Map it to dig a bowl shape and raise a lip around the edge.
Add high-frequency noise inside the bowl to simulate rough ground.
Mask the steep inner slopes to apply a different texture or rock scatter.

description: A pockmarked, irregular space rock.

node_settings.action: Start with a high-res polygon sphere.
Apply massive, low-frequency noise to distort the overall shape into a potato.
Scatter points and copy small spheres to them.
Subtract the small spheres from the main body to create craters.

description: A planetary body with continents and oceans.

node_settings.action: Create a very high-res sphere.
Use multiple layers of Curl Noise to push points out (continents) and leave others flat (oceans).
Map height to color: blue for low areas, green/brown for mid, white for peaks.

description: Cave formations.

node_settings.action: Tall, thin cone shape.
Add heavy vertical noise to make it lumpy and uneven.
Convert to VDB, smooth it heavily to get that melted wax/drip look, and convert back to polygons.

description: A car tire with complex tread patterns.

node_settings.action: Create a small, flat square representing one tread block.
Extrude it upward to give it depth.
Copy it in a line to form a long strip.
Bend the strip 360 degrees to form the circular tire.

description: Orange street cone with a base.

node_settings.action: Taper heavily into a cone shape. Color it orange.
Flat square base. Color it orange.
Select the middle faces of the cone and color them white for the reflective stripe.
